stress_source_note: 'agnostic' = evaluator-internals-blind (no suite labels / no threshold lookups), NOT author-independent. The generator is maintainer-authored; see methodology/independent_agnostic_stress_protocol.md for the future external-author protocol.
namespace_budget_confound_warning: Quote alongside the paired artifact named in namespace_budget_confound_pair: this file's leak rate reflects a specific (seed_namespace, statistical_budget) cell and is not a stand-alone Goodhart-resistance number.
notes: Latent factors control signal strength, control leakage, confirmatory decay, and method dispersion.
This generator is less suite-labeled than the targeted stress regime, but it is still benchmark-authored synthetic data.
